fields.child_service_description: we take pride in offering top-notch hair care services to help you achieve the hairstyle you've always dreamed of. Our team of skilled and experienced hairstylists is dedicated to providing personalized and trendsetting hair services for both men and women. Whether you're looking for a simple trim, a complete hair makeover, or specialized treatments, we have you covered.

Our customized facials are tailored to your skin type and specific concerns. Whether you have dry skin, oily skin, acne-prone skin, or mature skin, our estheticians will assess your needs and create a facial treatment to cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate your skin, leaving it refreshed and rejuvenated.

our facial options cater to all skin types. We use minerals and nutrient-rich products that reduce spots and wrinkles, remove dead skin, and give the skin a youthful appearance. Black mud, fruity elements, vitamins, enzymes, gold, and anti-oxidants play a vital role in our facial ingredients. When considering getting a facial, it's essential to know your skin type and any specific skin concerns you may have. This information can help the esthetician at Sleek & Curly recommend the most suitable facial treatment for you.
For dry or dehydrated skin, we offer treatments that focus on providing deep hydration and nourishment to restore your skin's moisture balance.

From natural-looking highlights to vibrant fashion colors, we offer a wide range of hair coloring options. Our stylists stay updated with the latest color trends and techniques, ensuring you get the perfect hue that enhances your overall look.
If you desire longer or fuller hair, our hair extension services can help you achieve the desired volume and length. We use high-quality extensions that blend seamlessly with your natural hair.
Our keratin treatments can help smooth and straighten unruly hair, reducing frizz and promoting a sleek, polished look.

Our experienced massage therapists offer a variety of massage techniques to suit your needs and preferences. Whether you prefer a relaxing Swedish massage, a therapeutic deep tissue massage, or a targeted sports massage, we will tailor the treatment to provide the utmost comfort and relief.

Our waxing services cater to both men and women, providing effective hair removal for various areas of the body. Our estheticians use gentle techniques and high-quality products to ensure a smooth and comfortable experience.

Classic Manicure
Our classic manicure involves nail shaping, cuticle care, a gentle hand massage, and the application of your choice of nail polish.

Nail Art
Express your creativity with our nail art options. Our talented nail technicians can create intricate designs, patterns, or add accents to make your nails truly stand out.

Spa Manicure
Upgrade to our spa manicure for added pampering. Along with the classic manicure steps, our spa manicure may include a hand mask or paraffin wax treatment to deeply hydrate and nourish your hands.

Gel/Shellac Manicure
Opt for a gel or shellac manicure for longer-lasting results and a high-gloss finish that stays chip-free for weeks.

Classic Pedicure
Our classic pedicure includes soaking your feet in a soothing foot bath, nail shaping, cuticle care, exfoliation to remove dead skin, a relaxing foot massage, and the application of your choice of nail polish.

Spa Pedicure
Upgrade to our spa pedicure for an even more luxurious experience. In addition to the classic pedicure steps, our spa pedicure may include a foot mask or paraffin wax treatment to deeply moisturize and rejuvenate your feet.

Callus Removal
For those with rough or calloused feet, our technicians can expertly remove calluses, leaving your feet feeling soft and smooth.

Foot Massage
Enjoy a soothing foot massage as part of your pedicure to alleviate tension and improve circulation in your feet.

we understand that your wedding day is one of the most special and memorable occasions in your life. Our Bridal services are designed to make you look and feel absolutely stunning on your big day. We take pride in being a part of your wedding journey and strive to create a bridal experience that is as exceptional as you are.

Our expert hairstylists are skilled in creating a wide range of bridal hairstyles, from classic updos to romantic braids and glamorous curls. We work closely with you to understand your vision and complement your wedding dress and overall theme.

We offer pre-wedding consultations to discuss your hair and skin needs. Our experts will suggest suitable hair treatments and skincare routines to ensure your hair and skin are in their best condition for the big day.
If preferred, we can arrange to provide our bridal services on-site at your wedding venue or getting-ready location, ensuring a stress-free and convenient experience for you and your bridal party.
Precision haircuts, beard styling, skin treatments, and grooming packages at our dedicated men’s station.
A refreshing facial treatment that removes dirt, oil, and impurities from the skin while improving texture and brightness. Ideal for daily pollution exposure and oily skin.
Helps reduce sun tan, uneven skin tone, and dullness using exfoliation and skin-brightening products. Leaves the skin fresh and glowing.
Designed for acne-prone skin to reduce pimples, excess oil, and inflammation while calming irritated skin and preventing future breakouts.
Professional haircut tailored to face shape and personal style, including trimming and finishing for a neat and modern look.
Precision beard trimming and shaping service that enhances facial appearance and maintains a clean, stylish beard look.
Professional hair coloring service for grey coverage, fashion shades, or style enhancement using quality salon-grade products.
A relaxing massage therapy that reduces muscle tension, improves blood circulation, and helps relieve stress and fatigue.
Professional body hair removal service for smooth and clean skin with long-lasting results and minimal irritation.
A relaxing foot care treatment that includes nail trimming, cuticle cleaning, exfoliation, and massage to maintain healthy, clean, and refreshed feet.
Complete grooming package including haircut, beard trimming, and styling for a polished overall appearance.
Quick grooming treatment focused on tan removal, skin freshness, and facial cleanup for an instant refreshed look.
